entries.source: Chat Edit: 'able to create models on the fly with just a description IE a small terminius deep seek style model that has the speed of gemini pro its able to on the fly change its size (1B to 500B flash using customization IE creates a offline memory bank where each form of quantization and flash are stored or on the fly made and able tobe swapped and changed as needed IE need a 120b gps but have a 1.95GB model and it makes pure masm patches/hdd space needed to work(I have 14TB of storage)'
